name: Broccoli (or Asparagus) & Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the florets off the broccoli stalks.
2. Cut the stalks (or asparagus stalks) into 1/2-inch thick slices.
3. Combine the soy sauce, sherry, and ginger in a bowl.
4. Marinate the beef in the mixture for about 10 minutes.
5. Heat peanut oil in a hot wok or large skillet.
6. Drain the beef from the marinade and add to the wok.
7. Let the meat cook until lightly browned on one side, without turning it.
8. Remove the meat from the wok and set aside, keeping it warm.
9. Add another tablespoon of peanut oil to the wok.
10. Add the garlic, broccoli (or asparagus), and stir-fry over high heat for about 6 minutes until the vegetables are still crunchy.
11. Return the beef to the wok.
12. Combine the sauce ingredients in a separate bowl.
13. Add the sauce to the wok and stir until it is well blended.
14. Serve immediately.
